title: Classes, Modifiers, Private State, and Abstract Contracts · Compiler Case: Composition Inheritance
summary: Implement scheduling components with runtime invariants, replaceable policies, and explicit construction rules. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts composition inheritance increment in a typed scheduling component library. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose composition or inheritance from substitution, state ownership, variation axes, and test isolation.
Use abstract classes and implements clauses while recognizing that implementation checks do not change inferred member types.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
